---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new validation rule or workflow
title: "Feature: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What maintainer burden or upstream risk should this reduce?

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the rule or workflow.

## Themis Surface

- [ ] CLI command or option
- [ ] GitHub Action input/output
- [ ] `.themis.toml` config/schema
- [ ] Finding code or severity
- [ ] Report format
- [ ] Documentation only

## Hard Blocker Or Warning

Should this fail the submission or only warn? Explain why.

## Target Project Examples

Link to real upstream policies or review practices that justify the behavior.

## Compatibility

Would this be safe for a patch release, require a minor release, or change the 1.x compatibility surface?
